name: Bogracs Gulyas (Kettle Goulash)
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds stewing beef; cut into 1-inch cubes
1 cup sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Heat fat in a deep heavy pot over low heat.
3. Cook the onions, peppers, and garlic until the onions are limp and transparent. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
4. Add paprika when it has lost its raw taste (about 5 minutes).
5. Add beef and remaining ingredients except sour cream. Mix well to combine.
6. Place the pot in the preheated oven and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours, or until the meat is tender. Check the temperature periodically; if the contents are too hot, adjust the oven temperature so they remain at a gentle simmer.
7. Serve in shallow soup bowls with a tablespoon of sour cream atop each serving.
